title: Marceau Solutions — Complete Operations Guide
subtitle: Everything That's Running, How to Use It, and What Happens Automatically
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## That Warning Message

The "development server" warning from Flask is normal and safe to ignore. It means Flask is using its built-in server instead of a production-grade one like Gunicorn. For a local dashboard only YOU access on your own machine, this is fine. It's not exposed to the internet. If we ever need to deploy the Command Center to EC2 for remote access, we'd swap to Gunicorn then.

---

## The Three Access Points

You have three independent ways to interact with your business systems. If any one goes down, the other two still work.

### 1. Command Center (Web Dashboard)
**Launch**: `./scripts/command-center.sh`
**URL**: http://127.0.0.1:8780
**Works on**: Browser (desktop or phone on same WiFi)
**Best for**: Logging daily numbers, managing pipeline, generating documents, checking revenue

### 2. Clawdbot (Telegram)
**Access**: Open Telegram, message @w_marceaubot
**Best for**: On-the-go updates, quick status checks, logging visits from the field
**Automated messages**: Morning check-in (6:45am), EOD prompt (7pm), Weekly summary (Sunday 7pm)

### 3. Claude Code (Terminal)
**Access**: Open VS Code or terminal
**Best for**: Building new features, debugging, strategic planning, complex tasks

All three read from and write to the same Google Sheets, Stripe, and n8n backend.

---

## Command Center — Feature Guide

### Daily Scorecard (Main Page)
This is your home screen. Shows Day X of 90 and Week X of 12.

**Input fields**:
- Energy Level (1-10) — rate how you feel today
- Outreach Count — total messages sent (warm + cold + in-person)
- Meetings Booked — discovery calls scheduled
- Videos Filmed — YouTube/content filmed today
- Content Posted — pieces published across platforms
- Training checkbox — did you train today
- Notes — anything worth remembering

**"Log Day" button** saves everything to the Google Sheets Scorecard automatically.

**Weekly progress bars** show your running totals vs targets for the week.

### Sales Pipeline
Track every prospect from first contact to closed deal.

**Stages**: Lead → Discovery → Proposal → Closed Won / Closed Lost

**Add Lead**: Click "Add Lead" button. Enter name, business, source (Apollo/walk-in/referral/website), deal value, notes.

**Move Stage**: Click the stage badge next to any lead to advance them to the next stage.

**Add Note**: Click the note icon to append context to any lead.

### Quick Actions

**Generate Proposal**: Fill in client name, business name, problem, solution, pricing. Generates a branded PDF proposal using the Marceau Solutions template. Downloads automatically.

**System Health**: Runs health_check.py and shows the status of EC2, n8n, Stripe, Twilio, and all APIs.

**View Revenue**: Pulls live data from Stripe — 7-day revenue, 30-day revenue, MRR, active subscriptions, recent charges.

**Content Production Pipeline** (3 actions):
- **Process Video**: Point to a directory of raw video files. Removes silence, outputs clean versions.
- **Extract Shorts**: Takes a processed video and splits it into 15-60 second clips for YouTube Shorts, Reels, TikTok.
- **Upload to YouTube**: Upload a video with title, description, tags. Uses your YouTube API credentials.

### Weekly Scorecard
Shows all 12 weeks of the 90-day plan.

**Color coding**: Green = on target, Yellow = close, Red = behind.

**90-Day Goals** with progress bars:
1. 3 paying AI services clients
2. 500+ YouTube subscribers
3. 1 digital fitness product live
4. First group coaching cohort forming
5. $3,000/mo revenue

### Content Calendar
Shows planned content by week. First 4 weeks pre-loaded with video topics from the execution plan.

**Checkboxes**: Mark content as published. Auto-stamps the date.

---

## Clawdbot — What It Understands

### Automated Messages (Come to You)
- **6:45am Mon-Fri**: Morning check-in with day number, week number, today's focus. Asks for energy level.
- **7:00pm Mon-Fri**: EOD prompt asking for your numbers.
- **7:00pm Sunday**: Weekly scorecard summary.

### Your Replies

| You Send | What Happens |
|---|---|
| A number 1-10 (e.g., "7") | Logs as your energy level for today |
| Four numbers (e.g., "87, 1, 2, 3") | Logs as outreach, meetings, videos, content posted |
| A large number (e.g., "47") | Logs as outreach count |
| "trained" or "gym done" | Marks training as complete for today |
| "status" or "how am I doing" | Returns current week metrics vs targets |
| "scorecard" | Returns full weekly scorecard |
| "goals" | Returns 90-day goal progress |
| "posted a video" | Increments content posted count |
| "note: [text]" | Saves a note for today |
| "fix outreach 95" | Corrects a previously logged value |
| "Visited [business] [notes]" | Logs a Naples in-person visit |
| "Move [lead] to proposal" | Updates a lead's pipeline stage |
| "treatment day" | Activates treatment mode (suppresses check-ins) |

### Treatment Day Mode
Activates automatically when:
- Your Google Calendar has an event with "treatment" or "medical" in the title
- You don't reply to the morning check-in by noon
- You text "treatment day"

When active: No accountability prompts. Daily digest still sent (passive). Inbound leads get auto-response. Only urgent alerts (payment failures, hot leads) come through.

Deactivates automatically when you send any reply the next day.

---

## What Runs Automatically (No Action Needed)

### N8N Workflows (49 Active)

**Accountability** (3 workflows):
- Morning-Accountability-Checkin — 6:45am ET Mon-Fri
- EOD-Accountability-Checkin — 7pm ET Mon-Fri
- Weekly-Accountability-Report — 7pm ET Sunday

**Outreach** (3 workflows):
- Calendly-Booking-Alert — Telegram alert when someone books a discovery call
- Visit-Logging-Webhook — logs Naples visits, sets 48-hour follow-up reminder
- Inbound-Lead-Router — classifies new leads as AI Services / Fitness / WebDev, alerts via Telegram

**Treatment** (1 workflow):
- Treatment-Day-Detector — checks Google Calendar daily at 5am for treatment events

**PT Coaching** (5 workflows):
- Payment welcome, Monday check-in, cancellation exit, SMS outreach, follow-up sequence

**Lead Capture** (6 workflows):
- Lead magnet, website contact, automation inquiry, creator inquiry, premium waitlist, 7-day challenge

**Nurture** (8 workflows):
- 7-day sequences for automation, creator, website, general leads + follow-up engine + non-converter re-engagement + challenge upsell + digital product delivery

**Web Dev** (5 workflows):
- Payment welcome, monthly check-in, deploy notification, cross-referral, Flames form pipeline

**Content** (5 workflows):
- X/Twitter scheduler, batch image generator, post image generator, post webhook, weekly analytics

**YouTube Analytics** (1 workflow):
- Collects subscriber count, views, recent video stats every Sunday 8pm

**Billing** (2 workflows):
- Payment failed alert + invoice paid tracker

**Infrastructure** (6 workflows):
- Self-Annealing error handler, SMS response handler, health check, GitHub push notifications, daily operations digest, monthly backup

### Launchd Schedules (10 Active on Mac)

| Schedule | Frequency | What It Does |
|---|---|---|
| Health Check | Daily 7am | Full system health verification |
| Revenue Report | Monday 9am | Weekly revenue snapshot |
| Weekly Business Report | Monday 9am | Full branded PDF report → Telegram |
| Monthly Review | 1st of month 9am | Monthly trend analysis PDF → Telegram |
| n8n Backup | Sunday 4am | Workflow backup to git |
| AutoIterator Overnight | Daily 2am | Run A/B test experiments |
| AutoIterator Weekly | Monday 3am | Weekly experiment evaluation |
| AutoIterator Cycle | Scheduled | Continuous optimization loop |
| AutoIterator Batch | Scheduled | Batch experiment processing |
| Auto-Iterator Weekly | Monday 3am | Legacy schedule (duplicate, harmless) |

### AutoIterator (Autonomous Optimization)
Runs overnight at 2am. Proposes SMS copy variants, email subject lines, and website CTAs. Tests them against current versions using AI evaluation. Deploys winners automatically. You get a Telegram notification when a winning variant is found.

Three active strategies: SMS outreach, nurture email, website CTA.

---

## Automated Upgrade Triggers

These fire automatically when business milestones are hit. Each references a pre-written plan that's ready to execute immediately.

| Trigger | Condition | Plan |
|---|---|---|
| FitAI client portal migration | 5+ active PT clients | docs/upgrade-triggers/fitai-portal-migration-plan.md |
| Paid ads activation | MRR > $2,000/mo | docs/upgrade-triggers/paid-ads-activation-plan.md |
| Group coaching launch | 500 YouTube subs OR 3+ requests | docs/upgrade-triggers/group-coaching-launch-plan.md |
| Digital product ($19.99) launch | 10+ YouTube videos published | docs/upgrade-triggers/digital-product-launch-plan.md |
| Bridge modularization | 3+ incidents from agent_bridge | docs/upgrade-triggers/bridge-modularization-plan.md |

---

## Content Production Pipeline

All accessible from Command Center Quick Actions or terminal.

### Film → Process → Upload Workflow

**Step 1: Film** your videos on Tue/Thu (per calendar).

**Step 2: Process** — removes silence and dead air:
- Command Center: Quick Actions → Process Video → enter folder path
- Terminal: `./scripts/process-batch-content.sh /path/to/raw/videos/`
- Output goes to `output/processed/[date]/`

**Step 3: Extract Shorts** — splits into 15-60 second clips:
- Command Center: Quick Actions → Extract Shorts → enter video path
- Terminal: `python3 scripts/extract-shorts.py /path/to/video.mp4`
- Options: `--duration 30` (seconds per clip), `--split-at-silence` (smart splitting at natural pauses)
- Output goes to `output/shorts/[date]/`

**Step 4: Upload to YouTube**:
- Command Center: Quick Actions → Upload to YouTube → enter file, title, description, tags
- Terminal: `python3 scripts/upload-to-youtube.py --file video.mp4 --title "Title" --description "Desc" --tags "fitness,dystonia"`
- Defaults to unlisted. Add `--privacy public` when ready to publish.

---

## Reports That Come to You

**Weekly Business Report** (Monday 9am, Telegram):
Branded PDF with outreach metrics vs targets, pipeline summary, Stripe revenue, 90-day goal progress, AutoIterator experiment count.

**Monthly Business Review** (1st of month, Telegram):
Branded PDF with month-over-month trends, revenue trajectory, recommendations based on gaps.

**Daily Operations Digest** (8am, email):
Business metrics summary from n8n.

All automated. You receive them. No action needed unless numbers are off.

## What You Do vs. What the System Does

| You Do | System Does |
|---|---|
| Send outreach messages | Track volume, calculate conversion rates, send weekly report |
| Film content | Process video, extract shorts, track publishing metrics |
| Walk into Naples businesses | Log visit (Command Center or Clawdbot), set follow-up reminder |
| Take discovery calls | Alert you on booking, log to pipeline, track close rate |
| Send proposals | Generate branded PDF in 60 seconds via Command Center |
| Log your daily numbers | Calculate weekly totals, compare to targets, report progress |
| Train | Log it with one tap or "trained" to Clawdbot |
| Take a treatment day | System detects it, suppresses prompts, runs autonomously, summarizes what happened when you're back |
| Sleep | AutoIterator optimizes your outreach copy at 2am |

---

## Day 1 Checklist (Right Now)

1. Open Command Center: `./scripts/command-center.sh`
2. Print the AI services one-pager: `docs/ai-services-one-pager.pdf`
3. Send your first 50 warm outreach messages (Hormozi magic script)
4. Log your numbers in the Command Center at end of day
5. Reply to Clawdbot's 7pm EOD prompt with your numbers
6. Tomorrow morning: Clawdbot sends Day 2 check-in at 6:45am automatically

The system is running. Go make money.
